title: About Me
intro: A short introduction to who I am, what I work on, and what I’m aiming toward.

sections.title: Who I Am
sections.content: I’m Benjamin Jarlsson Nemeth, an Electrical Engineering student at DTU with a strong interest in systems that combine hardware, software, and intelligent behavior.

sections.title: What I Do
sections.content: I enjoy building projects that connect theory with practical implementation, especially where electronics, software, and system architecture meet.
